stories.headline: Creative and colorful hats steal the show at the Royal Ascot horse races in England, in photos - AP News
stories.summary: ASCOT, Britain (AP) — Extravagant, elaborate and sometimes gravity-defying hats take center stage each summer at Royal Ascot, the five-day horse racing festival held at Ascot Racecourse in southern E…

stories.headline: BBC To Cancel Shows & “Review” TV Networks As It Cuts Content Spend By $107M - Deadline
stories.summary: The BBC's new director general has announced plans to slash commissioning spend across its TV, radio, and news divisions by £80M ($107M).

stories.headline: The Sphere’s Next Big Movie After ‘Oz’ to Be ‘Rocky Horror Picture Show’ - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The Jim Dolan-owned Las Vegas venue, which has reeled in $400 million in ticket sales for its adaptation of the 1939 classic, is now planning to super-size the 1975 cult feature.

stories.headline: Mike Myers Says, “Yes,” There Will Be An ‘Austin Powers 4’ - Deadline
stories.summary: Myers has long said he'd be interested in another sequel, but been noncommittal if it would actually happen. He has said he'd like it to focus heavily on Dr. Evil.

stories.headline: ‘Top Gear’s Jeremy Clarkson Diagnosed With “Aggressive” Cancer: “It’s Really Early” - Deadline
stories.summary: Jeremy Clarkson has revealed that he is battling prostate cancer. The Top Gear legend opened up about his diagnosis during the final episodes of Clarkson's Farm Season 5.

stories.headline: Jelly Roll's Daughter Bailee Ann "Disgusted" by Comments on Bunnie Xo Divorce - E! News
stories.summary: Bailee Ann DeFord reacted to all the attention on her dad Jelly Roll’s divorce from stepmom Bunnie Xo, calling the situation a “clearly private family matter.”

stories.headline: 'Love Island USA' Honors Exec Producer James Barker Following Sudden Death in Fiji - TMZ
stories.summary: "Love Island USA" paid tribute to one of its own Tuesday night ... honoring executive producer James Barker following his death in Fiji last week.
